kh-subtitle: Browse every Spirit, see where each crafting material drops, and check off the Recipes you own. Spirit ownership saves in your browser; Treasure cross-offs and Recipe items stay in sync with the Achievement Tracker.
kh-tracker-link: ← Back to the Dream Drop Distance Achievement Tracker
dg-spirits-hint: Click a Spirit for its stats, resistances, dispositions and full Ability Link board. Use the ★ to mark it owned (greyed-out = not obtained).
dg-materials-hint: Each material's drop sources. Hover a Dream Eater to see the worlds it appears in, or a Treasure to see its chest locations — chests already crossed off in the tracker are struck through.
dg-recipes-hint: A checklist of every Spirit's Recipe item. This shares its data with the Achievement Tracker, so checking one here checks it there too.
dg-c-hint: Stats are computed from the Spirit's breed base value, rank, level and the active Forecast: Stat = base × (rank correction + random) × level correction ÷ 10, plus the Forecast bonus, capped at each stat's maximum. A Risky Winds Forecast creates the Spirit one rank higher and makes the rarer alternate Spirit much more likely (its odds rise by 50%).
dg-c-pick-mat: Pick at least one material to see what it can create.
dg-c-no-recipe: No recipe uses that combination of Dream Pieces.
dg-c-unreachable: No recipe can reach a Rank %1 %2 under this Forecast. Try a Risky Winds Forecast, or a lower rank.
dg-c-materials-hint: Pick a Dream Piece in slot 1 (leave slot 2 on “any”) to see every Spirit that combination can create, with its rank and stats. Use “By Spirit” to work out the amounts for a specific rank.
dg-c-spirit-hint: Pick a Spirit and a rank (or “any”). For a set rank, every recipe that reaches it is listed with the exact amounts; “any” lists all of its recipes.
dg-ab-hint: Find which Spirits grant an ability and where on their board. Permanent (Support) abilities stay with Sora and Riku once unlocked on any Spirit. A Spirit chip lights up if you own it, and turns green once you've unlocked that node. Hover for the cost/condition, click to open its board.
dg-board-tip: Hover a node for its ability, cost and unlock condition.
dg-preview: Preview (mark owned to save a rank)
dg-board-click: Click a node to mark it unlocked.
dg-secret-change: Changes after the Red Secret — click again (once that Secret is unlocked) to switch to the second ability.
dg-cmd-hint: Every Deck Command you can sacrifice when creating a Spirit, and the bonuses it passes on: flat stat gains, elemental resistances (%) and max affinity. Click a column to sort; filter by name or type.
